title: OpenTelemetry SpanBuilder Flow
interaction_flow: User → Tracer: spanBuilder(spanName) [create builder via TracerInterface]
Tracer → SpanBuilder: new SpanBuilder(spanName, instrumentationScope, tracerSharedState)
User → SpanBuilder: setParent($context) [ContextInterface|false|null] → returns SpanBuilderInterface
SpanBuilder → Context: Context::getCurrent() [if no parent provided, resolves current context]
SpanBuilder → Context: Context::resolve($context) [resolves ContextInterface from parent arg]
User → SpanBuilder: setAttribute(string $key, $value) → returns SpanBuilderInterface
User → SpanBuilder: setAttributes(iterable $attributes) → returns SpanBuilderInterface
User → SpanBuilder: addLink(SpanContextInterface $context, iterable $attributes = []) → returns SpanBuilderInterface
User → SpanBuilder: addEvent(string $name, iterable $attributes = [], ?int $timestamp = null) → returns SpanBuilderInterface
User → SpanBuilder: recordException(Throwable $exception, iterable $attributes = []) → returns SpanBuilderInterface
User → SpanBuilder: setSpanKind(int $spanKind) → returns SpanBuilderInterface
User → SpanBuilder: setStartTimestamp(int $timestampNanos) → returns SpanBuilderInterface
User → SpanBuilder: startSpan() → returns SpanInterface
SpanBuilder → SpanContext: [create/resolve SpanContext for new span via DDTrace\OpenTelemetry\API\Trace\SpanContext]

SpanBuilder → Span: Span::startSpan(DDTrace\SpanData, SpanContextInterface, InstrumentationScope, kind, parentSpan, parentContext, SpanProcessor, ResourceInfo, attributes[], links[], totalRecordedLinks, events[])
Span → SpanProcessor: [onStart callback triggered on span start]
SpanBuilder → User: return Span (implements SpanInterface)
User → Span: setAttribute(string $key, $value) → SpanInterface
User → Span: addEvent(string $name, iterable $attributes, $timestamp) → SpanInterface
User → Span: setStatus(string $code, ?string $description) → SpanInterface
User → Span: end(?int $endEpochNanos) → void
Span → SpanProcessor: [onEnd callback triggered on span end]

Span.internal_factory: static startSpan(DDTrace\SpanData, SpanContextInterface, InstrumentationScopeInterface, int $kind, SpanInterface $parentSpan, ContextInterface $parentContext, SpanProcessorInterface, ResourceInfo, array $attributes, array $links, int $totalRecordedLinks, array $events, bool $isRemapped): self

key_relationships: SpanBuilder depends_on TracerSharedState (holds SpanProcessor, Sampler, Resource)
SpanBuilder creates Span via Span::startSpan() static factory
SpanBuilder uses Context::resolve() to determine parent context
SpanContext can be created locally or from remote parent (distributed tracing)
Context is propagated via ContextStorage (fiber/execution-context aware)
builder_pattern_notes: SpanBuilder follows OTel fluent builder pattern — all setter methods return SpanBuilderInterface for chaining. setParent() accepts ContextInterface|false|null: false/null = no parent (root span), ContextInterface = extract parent span from context. startSpan() is terminal — creates and returns the Span. Span is NOT automatically activated; caller must call $span->activate() via Context to make it current.
ddtrace_bridge_notes: DDTrace implements OTel API natively: SpanBuilder and Span are final classes in DDTrace\OpenTelemetry namespace but implement standard OTel interfaces. Span::getDDSpan() provides access to internal DDTrace\SpanData. SpanContext::createFromLocalSpan() bridges DDTrace spans into OTel SpanContext.
span_lifecycle: 2. SpanBuilder: optional setParent(), setAttribute/s(), addLink(), addEvent(), setSpanKind(), setStartTimestamp()
4. Active span work: setAttribute(), addEvent(), recordException(), setStatus()
5. span->activate() → ScopeInterface (makes span current in Context)
6. Span::end() → SpanProcessor::onEnd triggered, span data exported
